macros.token: --chunk_size $chunk_size #if $compute_embeddings: --compute_embeddings #end if #if $var_index: --var_index '$var_index' #end if #if $obs_subset_conditional.obs_subset == 'true': --obs_subset "['$obs_subset_column', ${obs_subset_values.replace(' ', '').split(',')}]" #end if #if $var_subset_conditional.var_subset == 'true': --var_subset "['$var_subset_column', ${var_subset_values.replace(' ', '').split(',')}]" #end if #if $batch_processing_conditional.batch_processing == 'true': --batch processing --batch_size $batch_size #end if &&

param.name: stem
param.label: Enter a prefix for the output file(s)

param.name: save_h5ad
param.label: Save h5ad file
param.help: If the AnnData object should also be written to an h5ad file.

param.name: compute_embeddings
param.label: Compute embeddings
param.help: If `X_umap` and `X_pca` embeddings will be computed.

param.name: var_index
param.label: Alternative var index
param.help: Alternative `var` column name with `var` names to be used in the visualization.

param.name: obs_subset
param.label: Subset obs
param.help: Subset the AnnData object on a specific 'obs' column with one or more values.

param.name: obs_subset_column
param.label: obs column name
param.help: obs column to apply the subset on.

param.name: var_subset
param.label: Subset var
param.help: Subset the AnnData object on a specific 'var' column with one or more values.

param.name: var_subset_column
param.label: var column name
param.help: var column to apply the subset on.

param.name: batch_processing
param.label: Enable batch processing
param.help: If the expression matrix will be written to Zarr incrementally. Use to avoid loading the whole AnnData into memory.

param.name: batch_size
param.label: Batch size
param.help: The amount of rows (if matrix is in CSR format) or columns (if matrix is dense or in CSC format) of the expression matrix to process at a time when batch processing. Default value: 10000

param.name: ref_img
param.label: Reference image
param.help: Reference image from which to get the shape for the label image

param.name: obs_subset
param.label: Subset obs
param.help: Subset the AnnData object on a specific 'obs' column with one or more values.

param.name: obs_subset_column
param.label: obs column name
param.help: obs column to apply the subset on.

param.name: z_index
param.label: Z indices
param.help: Comma-separated list of Z indices to process. Default value: [0].
